unit: Unit 12: Everyday Life with Your Computer
title: Social Media and Videos
drDigitalIntro: Social media platforms let you share photos, stay in touch with family, and follow news. Popular ones include Facebook, Instagram, and YouTube. YouTube is great for tutorials, entertainment, and watching TV clips. To use them, create a free account on their website. Privacy tip: be thoughtful about what personal information you share publicly — use privacy settings to control who sees your posts.

playgroundTask.question: You want to watch a tutorial video on how to bake a cake. Which website should you visit?

drDigitalSuccess: YouTube is the world's largest video library — you can find tutorials for almost anything, including baking!
drDigitalHint: Which website is specifically for watching and sharing videos?
